creator: jamie@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 257510
Mention the possibility of newlines in parameters; count all whitespace for quotes.

This patch makes it clear that printing a parameter with a newline prints a newline.  It also fixes the -q option to properly count newlines as whitespace when deciding whether to put quotes around a string.

jls(8) doesn't trim newlines at the end of a parameter, nor does jail(8).  It appears that sh(1) is responsible for that.
